TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Goatmen Raiders Faction.

Translations.Comment: Ziegenmenschen = goatmen (beast-men with goat features). Plünderer = raiders.
Standard goat-men warriors. Savage and brutal.
Mischling = mongrel/mixed breed. Horde = pack. Chaotic mass of lesser beast-men.
Plünder- prefix = raiding. Fast attack chariot.
Wilde = feral/wild. Jagdhunde = hunting hounds. Savage war beasts.
Plänkler = skirmishers. Light troops for harassment.
Standard German for centaurs. Half-man, half-horse.
Standard German for minotaurs. Bull-headed warriors.
Flying monsters allied with the beast-men.
Wilder = feral/wild. Untamed giant serving the beast-men.
Tribal magic user. Dark rituals and curses.
Langhorn = longhorn. Elite warrior with impressive horns.
